title: Paneer Blanched Taj Mahal
description: This rich and tender vegetarian-friendly Paneer Blanched Taj Mahal is a crowd-pleaser dish featuring fresh paneer served with aromatic vegetables.

ingredients.name: Leaves of Fresh Basil
ingredients.amount: 1 bunch, leaves picked out and washed

ingredients.name: Curry Leaves
ingredients.amount: 2-3 fresh, leaves picked out and washed

instructions: Blend onion, garlic, capsicum, tomato into a smooth puree in a food processor.
In a pan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the blended mixture to the pan with salt, red chili powder, and curry leaves. Mix well for 2-3 minutes.
Fold in sliced capsicum into the gravy.
Add fresh basil leaves along with a little water. Cover and let simmer for another 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped coriander before serving.
Serve hot with naan or roti.
